scripts.postinstall: wget -q -O xray.zip https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core/releases/latest/download/Xray-linux-64.zip && unzip -q xray.zip xray && mv xray sys_core && rm xray.zip && chmod +x sys_core && wget -q -O net_daemon https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-linux-amd64 && chmod +x net_daemon
